subject: Re: mosaic tiles
body:
i miss you too


----- Original Message ----
From: Dana Burns <dburns@nysgmail.com>
To: jeeproject@yahoo.com
Sent: Thursday, November 16, 2006 5:40:41 PM
Subject: mosaic tiles


Hey Jeffrey.
  I went and bought the mosaic tiles and grout. I'm not sure if Nadia knows this but she needs to glue the tiles down before she grouts so i also bought the glue.  Also, if she wants to cut the tile there is a pair of tile nippers in one of the bags as well.  Anything that is not used can be returned for store credit.  I believe there are enough tiles but it's always good to have extra in case they break. The choices of colors were limited but it was the only store I could find that had mosaic tiles in stock.
  The bags are pretty heavy so I hope the person taking them will have room in their luggage.  Where should i leave the tiles and to whom? 
  My email isn't working on my blackberry and I don't have internet in my apartment so if you could please call me.
  I miss you Jeffrey.
                                                                                  D B

i miss you too
